Flow.description:
31-Jul-2025: Created this version to allow temporary approval of 0/zero hour timesheets. Amend for the update of TSEs
Creates Timesheet Approval request jobs in the Agilyx Bulk Job Request object

formulas.description: Pick the first value that ends with ;
formulas.name: fmla_Single_PE

Flow.interviewLabel: Bulk Approve Timesheets via Bulk Job Submission {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Bulk Approve Timesheets Request Screen

recordCreates.name: Create_AGX_Bulk_Job_Request_Parameters
recordCreates.label: Create AGX Bulk Job Request Parameters

fields.name: Selected_start_date_0_0
fields.fieldText: NO TIMESHEETS FOUND TO APPROVE.

validationRule.errorMessage: End Date must be greater than or equal to start date.

fields.name: TS_count_display
fields.fieldText:
{!var_TS_count} Timesheets Submitted for Bulk Approval


Please wait a few minutes for Approval processes to complete.

fields.name: Selected_start_date
fields.fieldText:
TS Start Date from: {!Start_Date}

TS End Date to: {!End_Date}

value.stringValue: Name:122, tc9_et__Employee_Full_Name__c:214, tc9_et__Assignment__c:126, agx_Assignment_Type__c:150, tc9_et__Client_Name__c:235, tc9_et__Start_Date__c:111, tc9_et__End_Date__c:100, tc9_et__Total_Hours__c:121, tc9_et__Approval_Status_Colour__c:146

Name:false, tc9_et__Employee_Full_Name__c:true, tc9_et__Assignment__c:false, agx_Assignment_Type__c:false, tc9_et__Client_Name__c:true, tc9_et__Start_Date__c:false, tc9_et__End_Date__c:false, tc9_et__Total_Hours__c:false, tc9_et__Approval_Status_Colour__c:false
